claims.name: Gemma probe cross-topic pooled r
claims.statement: Leave-one-topic-out pooled Pearson r for the Gemma-3-27B ridge probe (L32, tb-5 / end-of-turn): predictions from every fold's held-out topic are concatenated and correlated with true Thurstonian utilities.

claims.name: Qwen probe heldout r
claims.statement: A ridge probe on Qwen-3.5-122B residual-stream activations at the turn-boundary tb-1 token (layer 38) predicts held-out Thurstonian utilities at Pearson r on a within-distribution eval split.
claims.derivation: `final_r` of the ridge probe with layer==38 in the manifest's `probes` array; round to 3dp.

claims.name: Qwen probe cross-topic pooled r
claims.statement: Leave-one-topic-out pooled Pearson r for the Qwen-3.5-122B ridge probe (L38, tb-1).

claims.name: Qwen probe heldout uniform pairwise accuracy
claims.statement: Uniform-sample pairwise accuracy of the Qwen-3.5-122B ridge probe (L38) on the within-distribution held-out eval split.
claims.derivation: `uniform_pairwise_acc` of the ridge probe with layer==38 in the manifest's `probes` array; round to 3dp.

claims.name: Cross model probe extras
claims.statement: Un-cited residual-stream probe accuracies rendered in fig:cross-topic: Gemma (L32, tb-5) held-out and leave-one-topic-out uniform-sample pairwise accuracy, and Qwen-3.5-122B (L38) leave-one-topic-out uniform-sample pairwise accuracy. Each cell is rounded to 3dp.
claims.derivation: gemma heldout acc: `uniform_pairwise_acc` of ridge probe at layer==32 in Gemma heldout manifest. gemma cross-topic acc: `separate_run.pooled_pairwise_acc` from Gemma pooled_metrics_clean.json. qwen cross-topic acc: `separate_run.pooled_pairwise_acc` from Qwen pooled_metrics_clean.json. All rounded to 3dp.

claims.name: Cross model content baseline
claims.statement: Qwen3-Embedding-8B sentence-transformer content baseline rendered in fig:cross-topic. Rows: target-model utility pool the baseline is trained on (gemma = Gemma-3-27B utilities, qwen = Qwen-3.5-122B utilities). Columns: `heldout r` = Pearson r on the within-distribution eval split; `cross-topic pooled r` = leave-one-topic-out pooled Pearson r; `heldout uniform pairwise accuracy` and `cross-topic uniform pairwise accuracy` = corresponding uniform-sample pairwise accuracies. All cells rounded to 3dp.
claims.derivation: For each row, read `final_r` and `uniform_pairwise_acc` of the ridge probe at layer==0 in the heldout manifest, and `separate_run.pooled_pearson_r` and `separate_run.pooled_pairwise_acc` from pooled_metrics_clean.json; round to 3dp.
